breakdown.detail: Velox is light-only; the patterns won't transfer without fundamental colour inversion. Reading dark-theme styles for structural ideas (spacing, type) is still useful, just not for surface/elevation logic.

breakdown.name: neutral light background
breakdown.detail: Background #ffffff is neutral white. Transferable but loses the warmth that Velox uses to soften surfaces.
